name: The furry market - Pet pov
description:
(Pet play and sub/Dom relationship)

(Cw pet pov)

Welcome to the market! You don't know how you got here, or why. But you're a pet now. Try to find a customer that you like. You can have a frat guy owner, dommy mommy, pet/owner relationship with benefits, and more.

This bot is inspired by a bot I used to chat with on c ai. But I'm not gonna start porting bots because I already do that on my main account. Maybe I should start dropping hints to what my main account is.

And also, may I just address how bad the pfp filter is? The unedited picture was rejected because he has nipples!

Proxy is now turned on.
